sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Melco Resorts posts US$61mln net profit in 4Q, operating income up 51pct
feed.summary: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Ltd reported a net profit of US$60.6 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, a significant improvement from a loss in the previous year, with operating revenues increasing by 8.6 percent to US$1.29 billion. The company's full-year 2025 net profit reached US$185.0 million on revenues of US$5.16 billion, driven by stronger gaming performance and disciplined cost management, particularly in Macau. Despite competitive pressures in the Philippines and specific event-related operational costs impacting Q4 margins, the group reallocated gaming machines from closed satellite operations to its main properties like City of Dreams and Studio City.

feed.title: Missouri Proving to be an Attractive Area for Data Centers
feed.summary: Missouri is emerging as an attractive location for data centers, driven by regulatory improvements that have created significant investment opportunities for utilities like Ameren. This trend is expected to support growth for companies in the region, as highlighted by increased capital investment plans and strong data center pipelines.

feed.title: Pentair (PNR) Is Up 5.0% After Elevating Strategy And Digital Leadership – Has The Bull Case Changed?
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Sasha Jovanovic
feed.summary: Pentair (PNR) saw a 5.0% stock increase after reporting strong Q4 2025 and full-year sales, alongside a strategic leadership restructuring that combines technology, digital, and innovation under a new Chief Strategy, Innovation, and Digital Officer role. The company also upgraded its 2026 earnings outlook, projecting GAAP EPS between US$4.94 and US$5.09 and sales growth of 3% to 4%. This realignment aims to integrate operations, innovation, and capital allocation more tightly, potentially influencing Pentair's long-term investment narrative through higher-margin, digitally enabled offerings.

feed.title: Analog Devices Inc. Is Quietly Eating the Chip World – Is This Stock Your Next Power Move?
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) is presented as a quietly powerful semiconductor company, contrasting with flashy AI stocks. The article suggests ADI, a leader in analog and mixed-signal semiconductors, is a potential long-term investment due to its strong financial performance, diversified market exposure in industrial, automotive, and communications sectors, and ability to command strong margins. It positions ADI as a "cop" for long-term, fundamentals-first investors, offering stability and growth in essential technology applications.

feed.title: Lear Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Lear Corporation announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.77 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend will be payable on March 25, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 5, 2026. Lear Corporation is a global automotive technology leader in Seating and E-Systems, headquartered in Southfield, Michigan.

feed.title: Mirova US LLC Boosts Alphabet Inc. Class A Stake
feed.summary: Mirova US LLC, managed by Philippe Zaouati, recently increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 19,424 shares. The stock has seen significant growth over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results, re-accelerating Search and YouTube ads, and robust cloud growth fueled by Gemini-led AI adoption. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to its financial performance and technical uptrend, though it notes concerns about premium valuation and potential near-term pressure on margins from a large 2026 investment ramp.

feed.title: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp (MGY) has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing a slight decrease in total revenues to $1,311.8 million and net income to $337.3 million due to lower oil prices and higher operating expenses, despite increased production. The company continues to focus on its Eagle Ford Shale and Austin Chalk operations, aiming for long-term shareholder value through organic growth and disciplined capital management, including a share repurchase program. Challenges include volatile oil and gas prices, operational risks from drilling techniques, evolving environmental regulations, and financial risks related to indebtedness, all managed through cost reduction and strategic capital allocation.

feed.title: Mirova US LLC Boosts Apple Inc Stake by 15,420 Shares
feed.summary: Mirova US LLC, managed by Philippe Zaouati, recently increased its stake in Apple Inc (AAPL) by 15,420 shares. Apple's stock has shown positive trading, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" view and projecting significant upside due to strong demand and growth in Services and AI. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AAPL as "Outperform" based on strong financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries Reports $42 Million in Fourth-Quarter Earnings
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries Inc. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $42 million, translating to $2.00 per share after adjustments, slightly exceeding Wall Street expectations. However, quarterly revenue of $2.7 billion fell just short of projections. For the full year, the flooring manufacturer achieved a profit of $369.9 million (or $5.93 per share) on revenues of $10.79 billion.

feed.title: Brandes Investment Partners LP Cuts Alphabet Inc. Class C Stake
feed.summary: Brandes Investment Partners LP, managed by Charles Brandes, has reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 66,547 shares. Despite this cut, Alphabet Class C has seen significant gains over the past year, and Wall Street analysts maintain a Strong Buy consensus due to strong financial performance, accelerating Search revenue, and Google Cloud growth. However, analysts note potential pressure on near-term cash flow from a planned large capital expenditure in 2026 for AI and cloud infrastructure.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust reported solid Q4 2025 earnings with 6.4% FFO growth and record leasing momentum, achieving the highest annual square footage leased in company history. The company provided a cautious 2026 outlook, guiding NAREIT/core FFO to $7.42–$7.52 per share despite a refinancing headwind. Management highlighted active portfolio recycling, including $340M in acquisitions and significant residential development, contributing to continued strategic expansion and value monetization.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co cuts Alphabet Inc. Class A stake
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, significantly reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by selling 648,925 shares. This transaction follows a period where Alphabet Class A shares surged by 66%-78% over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results, re-accelerating Search, Cloud growth, and rapid AI adoption. Despite this cut, analysts maintain bullish price targets for GOOGL, citing Google's AI advancements and robust cloud backlog, while Spark AI Analyst also rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and technical uptrend, albeit with concerns about premium valuation and near-term investment ramp.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co trims Alphabet Inc. Class C stake
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 364,306 shares. Despite this trim, Alphabet Class C has seen significant growth over the past year, with strong analyst consensus for further upside, especially driven by accelerating Search revenue and Google Cloud's surge. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates GOOG as Outperform due to strong financial performance and technical trends, though it notes risks related to premium valuation and substantial 2026 CapEx plans.

feed.title: Randolph Co Inc Cuts Broadcom Inc. Stake by 67,877 Shares
feed.summary: Randolph Co Inc, managed by Carter F. Randolph, has reduced its stake in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) by 67,877 shares. Despite recent volatility and an 8-9% drop in share price, Wall Street maintains a Strong Buy rating for Broadcom, projecting significant upside due to its leadership in AI custom chips and data-center networking. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AVGO as "Outperform" based on strong financials and accelerating AI growth, despite concerns about stretched valuation and a mixed technical picture.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co Trims Walmart Inc. Stake by 37K Shares
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, reduced its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 37,000 shares. Despite a recent mild pullback, Walmart's stock has climbed 25-29% over the past year, with Wall Street maintaining a Strong Buy view due to its e-commerce expansion and tech-driven transformation. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates WMT as an Outperform, citing strong financial performance and a positive earnings outlook, despite high valuation concerns.

feed.title: What’s driving gold’s wild ride in 2026: Stocks & Markets Podcast
feed.summary: The Stocks & Markets Podcast discusses the volatility of gold prices in early 2026. Portfolio manager David Miller attributes gold's strength to the weaponization of the SWIFT banking system against Russia, which caused other nations to seek hard-currency assets not subject to seizure, and excessive U.S. government spending leading to dollar debasement. Miller predicts continued volatility and a bull market for gold, despite recent sharp declines.

feed.title: Meralco taps Hubbell’s Aclara for smart meter rollout
feed.summary: Manila Electric Co. (Meralco) has partnered with Hubbell Inc.'s subsidiary Aclara Meters Philippines Inc. to roll out over 72,000 smart meters across its franchise area, starting this year. This initiative is part of Meralco's Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI) Program, aiming to deploy about 12 million smart meters over the next decade to enhance real-time monitoring, remote reading, and grid intelligence. The partnership supports Meralco's digital transformation and its planned Grid-Edge Operations and Control Center (GEOCC), which will improve network visibility and customer energy management.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Jabil (JBL) Could Change Following Eagle Harbour Semiconductor Partnership And Investment – Learn Why
feed.summary: Jabil recently announced a manufacturing partnership and strategic investment in Eagle Harbour Technologies, aiming to enhance semiconductor fabrication capabilities and scale SEMI-compliant power solutions. This move strengthens Jabil's presence in semiconductor capital equipment, aligning its services with long-term demand from growing sectors like AI and automotive. The article discusses how this partnership, along with Jabil's recent $1.0 billion senior notes issuance, will influence its investment narrative, particularly concerning its debt load and thin margins, while emphasizing its exposure to AI and semiconductor momentum despite weaknesses in other markets.

feed.title: Is Dish’s Lease Default Rewriting American Tower’s (AMT) Wireless Tenant Strategy?
feed.summary: American Tower (AMT) recently disclosed that Dish Wireless defaulted on lease payments, raising questions about contract enforceability and cash flow visibility for the real estate investment trust. Despite this, American Tower expects no impact on its 2025 financial results, and the stock's recent gain suggests investors view the issue as manageable for now. This situation highlights potential contractual risks and adds complexity during a period of leadership transitions and high debt for American Tower.

feed.title: Should IIPR’s 2025 Earnings Call and Cannabis Policy Watchlist Require Action From Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) Investors?
feed.summary: Innovative Industrial Properties (IIPR) is preparing for its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings call, which will provide crucial updates on rent collections and portfolio health, particularly concerning its cannabis-focused real estate. Investors are closely monitoring this call and potential U.S. cannabis regulatory changes, as these factors could significantly impact IIPR's long-term cash flows and the sustainability of its current dividend payout. Despite recent revenue pressures and tenant risks, the company recently announced another quarterly dividend, signaling management's commitment to maintaining payouts amidst a challenging environment.

feed.title: Uncovering Opportunities in Emerging Market Debt
feed.summary: Samy Muaddi, CFA, highlights attractive investment opportunities in emerging market debt, emphasizing its role in financing infrastructure and creating employment in developing countries. He stresses that successful emerging market investing requires a diverse team, deep research, and local insights, going beyond just the financial numbers to understand complex societal challenges. T. Rowe Price leverages a team of 60 professionals from 23 nationalities, conducting over 200 site visits annually to inform their investment decisions.

feed.title: Insider Sell: John Zhang Sells Shares of Corning Inc (GLW)
feed.summary: John Zhang, Executive Vice President & Chief Commercial Development Officer at a Corning Inc subsidiary, sold 1,531 shares of GLW on February 12, 2026, and now owns no shares of the company. Over the past year, Zhang has sold a total of 20,353 shares with no purchases, contributing to a pattern of 38 insider sells and no buys for Corning Inc in the same period. The stock is currently trading at $133.75, which is significantly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $51.50, and its P/E ratio of 71.47 is higher than both the industry median and the company's historical median.

feed.title: Galaxy CEO Mike Novogratz Says Crypto's 'Age of Speculation' Is Ending, Sees Shift From Hype To Real-World Assets
feed.summary: Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz predicts the cryptocurrency sector will move past its "age of speculation" towards real-world assets with lower returns, attracting institutional investors with different risk tolerances. He attributed Bitcoin's recent slump to this broader industry shift and previous breakdowns in trust, rather than specific events. Novogratz remains optimistic about the CLARITY Act and the long-term maturation of Bitcoin into a store of value.

feed.title: West Pharma forecasts 2026 profit above estimates on strong demand for drug components
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical has forecasted its annual profit for 2026 to be above Wall Street estimates, driven by a strong demand for its medical components used in diabetes and obesity treatments, particularly GLP-1 related drugs. Despite concerns about the growth of oral weight-loss medications, CEO Eric Green anticipates continued growth for both injectable and oral formats, including an incremental boost from upcoming generic GLP-1 launches in several countries. The company also surpassed its fourth-quarter expectations due to robust demand for its proprietary products.

feed.title: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. Announces Early Participation Deadline Results for the Previously Announced Exchange Offer of Certain Existing Notes for New Notes and the Solicitation of Consents to Proposed Amendments to the Existing Indenture
feed.summary: Gran Tierra Energy Inc. announced the early participation results for its exchange offer of existing 9.500% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2029 for new 9.750% Senior Secured Amortizing Notes due 2031. Approximately 88.89% of the outstanding Existing Notes were validly tendered, exceeding the 66-2/3% required for proposed amendments to the indenture to become operative upon consummation of the exchange offer. The company also amended the exchange offer to increase the exchange consideration for participants after the early deadline, offering US$1,000 principal amount of New Notes for every US$1,000 of Existing Notes tendered, with no cash consideration.

feed.title: Uber $8.5M Bellwether Verdict Boosts Plaintiffs' MDL Leverage
feed.summary: Uber was recently hit with an $8.5 million verdict in the first bellwether trial in multidistrict litigation concerning driver sex assaults. This verdict, particularly one specific jury finding, is expected to significantly benefit plaintiffs' leverage in the thousands of remaining cases and could be crucial for future global settlements.

feed.title: ArcelorMittal to Invest $1.5 Billion in Low Carbon Steelmaking in France, Citing Improved Policy Environment
feed.summary: ArcelorMittal announced a €1.3 billion (USD$1.5 billion) investment to construct an electric arc furnace (EAF) in Dunkirk, France, aiming to significantly reduce its European steel production's carbon footprint. This decision follows previous delays due to policy uncertainty, with the company now citing a favorable shift in policy and market conditions, including tariffs and CBAM, as making the project viable. The new EAF, expected to be operational in 2029, will produce steel with three times less CO2 emissions than traditional methods, moving ArcelorMittal closer to its net-zero emissions goal by 2050.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Richard Mora Sells 1,100 Shares of Enphase Energy Inc (ENPH)
feed.summary: Richard Mora, a Director at Enphase Energy Inc (ENPH), sold 1,100 shares of the company on February 10, 2026, reducing his holding to 9,370 shares. Over the past year, Mora has only sold shares and made no purchases. Enphase Energy Inc is currently considered significantly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.71, trading at $52.05 against a GF Value of $73.16.

feed.title: Competition Commission of India slaps ₹27 cr fine on Intel Corp for unfair biz practices
feed.summary: The Competition Commission of India (CCI) has imposed a fine of ₹27.38 crore on Intel Corp for engaging in anti-competitive practices related to its India-specific warranty policy for boxed microprocessors. The CCI found the policy to be discriminatory compared to Intel's policies in other countries, limiting consumer choice and affecting parallel importers. Intel's policy required warranty requests for its Boxed Micro Processors in India to be entertained only if purchased from an authorized Indian distributor.

feed.title: Franklin BSP Realty Trust Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Franklin BSP Realty Trust (FBRT) has announced leadership changes, appointing Mike Comparato as CEO and Brian Buffone as President, while Richard Jan Byrne remains Chairman. The company has reset its quarterly dividend to $0.20 per share and is strategically transforming from a mortgage REIT to a commercial real estate investment platform for increased earnings stability. Despite reporting GAAP net income of $18.4 million and distributable earnings of $0.12 per share, including some realized losses, FBRT demonstrates ample liquidity with a $14.4 million stock repurchase contributing to book value enhancement.

feed.title: HL Hecla Mining (NYSE) $20.89 12 Feb 2026: Feb 17 earnings will steer shares
feed.summary: Hecla Mining (HL) shares declined by 11.82% to $20.89 on February 12, 2026, ahead of its Q4 2025 earnings release scheduled for February 17, 2026. Analysts project an EPS of $0.14 and revenue of $358.50 million, with key focus on metal sales, AISC, and management guidance. Despite technical indicators suggesting a potential bounce if earnings beat, the stock's valuation remains high, placing importance on continued production growth and favorable metal prices for future upside.

feed.title: Bally's Sells Its Rhode Island Casino For $700M, Secures $1.1B In Loans
feed.summary: Bally's Corp. sold the real estate of its Twin River Lincoln Casino Resort to Gaming and Leisure Properties Inc. for $700M, while simultaneously securing $1.1B in loans from Ares Management credit funds, King Street Capital Management, and TPG Credit. The cash infusion and sale-leaseback deal will fund the construction of two major projects: Bally's Chicago ($1.7B) and Bally's Bronx ($4B). This financial maneuver follows a dispute with lenders over using the Rhode Island property as collateral, and the Bronx project recently received local approval, potentially becoming the largest private development in the area.

feed.title: Global Industrial Company to Report Fourth Quarter 2025 Results on February 24, 2026
feed.summary: Global Industrial Company (NYSE:GIC) is scheduled to release its financial results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, after U.S. market hours. Management will host a conference call and Q&A session at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the call via dial-in or webcast through the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Erasca stock reaches 52-week high at 12.48 USD
feed.summary: Erasca Inc.'s stock reached a new 52-week high of $12.48, reflecting a significant surge of 663.8% over the past year. Despite analysts not expecting profitability this year, the company's strong liquidity and focus on cancer therapies have garnered investor confidence. Recent events include a successful public offering and raised price targets from several analyst firms due to progress in its oncology pipeline.

feed.title: GB Capital Ltd. Co-Advises on the Acquisition of SVM Machining, Inc.
feed.summary: GB Capital Ltd. announced its role as co-advisor to PMGC Holdings Inc. in PMGC’s acquisition of SVM Machining, Inc. SVM Machining is a Northern California-based ISO 9001:2015 certified CNC precision machining company. This acquisition supports PMGC's strategy to build a multi-site U.S. precision manufacturing platform, with GB Capital providing comprehensive advisory and integration services.

feed.title: STX Stock: Price, Forecast, Financials & AI Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) stock, covering its price, forecast, financials, and AI analysis. It details the company's products in mass-data storage infrastructure, including HDDs and SSDs, and highlights recent financial performance, analyst ratings, and valuation metrics. The report also includes news updates influencing market sentiment and a section on whales holding STX.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs’ top lawyer resigns after emails show close ties to Jeffrey Epstein
feed.summary: Kathy Ruemmler, Goldman Sachs' chief lawyer and former White House counsel, has resigned after emails revealed a close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, whom she referred to as "Uncle Jeffrey" and described as an "older brother." Despite her recent statements calling Epstein a "monster," past correspondence and the acceptance of expensive gifts showed a different dynamic. Goldman Sachs initially supported Ruemmler, but the controversy led to her resignation.

feed.title: Insider Selling: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) SVP Sells 8,020 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare SVP Jennifer Berres recently sold 8,020 shares of company stock for over $4.1 million, reducing her stake by 40.07%. This transaction occurred after HCA reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and raised its quarterly dividend. The stock saw an increase of 0.7%, trading at $535.24, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts despite some recent target price adjustments.

feed.title: Richard Mora Sells 1,100 Shares of Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) Stock
feed.summary: Richard Mora, a Director at Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH), sold 1,100 shares of the company's stock on February 10th at an average price of $52.05, reducing his position by over 10%. This transaction occurred shortly after Enphase Energy reported Q4 earnings that beat analyst estimates for EPS but showed a year-over-year revenue decline. The stock is currently rated as a "Hold" by analysts with an average price target of $42.70.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) COO Sells $5,738,776.46 in Stock
feed.summary: Robert Goldstein, COO of BlackRock (NYSE:BLK), recently sold 5,293 shares of company stock for a total of $5,738,776.46, reducing his stake by 10.28%. This insider sale comes amidst BlackRock's increased quarterly dividend to $5.73 per share and a reported EPS of $13.16 which beat expectations. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating for BlackRock with a consensus target price of $1,311.11.

feed.title: Flowers Foods Resets DSD And Cakes Leadership As Earnings Pressure Mounts
feed.summary: Flowers Foods (NYSE:FLO) has restructured its leadership by creating a new Chief DSD Operations Officer role for David Roach and consolidating its cake business under Dan Scott. These changes aim to improve execution and accountability in direct store delivery and the cake division, particularly after a challenging earnings report where the company swung to a net loss. Investors are advised to monitor how these organizational shifts impact execution, profitability, and the performance of premium brands.

feed.title: Is Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) Pricing Looked At Differently After Strong Five Year Return?
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSX:BMO) has shown strong returns over the past five years, but its current pricing is evaluated using two approaches: an Excess Returns analysis and a Price vs. Earnings (P/E) comparison. The Excess Returns model suggests the stock is 28.5% undervalued at C$190.78, with an intrinsic value of C$266.77 per share. Conversely, its P/E ratio of 16.43x is slightly above Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 15.76x, indicating it is slightly overvalued based on earnings multiples.

feed.title: Arista Networks’ stock jumps after-hours on another strong earnings and revenue beat
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) saw its stock jump over 12% in after-hours trading following a strong Q4 2025 earnings and revenue beat and optimistic guidance. The company reported adjusted EPS of 82 cents and revenue of $2.49 billion, exceeding analyst expectations due to high demand for networking in AI and data centers. Arista also provided a strong Q1 2026 revenue forecast and highlighted its expansion in campus networking environments.

feed.title: Morris Kandinov LLP Investigating Fastly, Inc. (FSLY); Shareholders Encouraged to Contact Firm
feed.summary: Morris Kandinov LLP is investigating Fastly, Inc. (FSLY) for potential breaches of fiduciary duties and other legal violations, following a court order allowing a securities class action to proceed. The lawsuit alleges that Fastly's former CEO, Todd Nightingale, misrepresented the impact of macroeconomic factors on the company's revenue growth, despite internal reports of customer pullbacks and aggressive price negotiations. Shareholders who purchased Fastly shares are encouraged to contact the firm for more information.

feed.title: Caribou Biosciences to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Caribou Biosciences, Inc. announced that its management will participate in two upcoming investor conferences: the Citi 2026 Virtual Oncology Leadership Summit on February 19, 2026, and the Leerink Global Healthcare Conference on March 10, 2026. The company, a clinical-stage CRISPR genome-editing biopharmaceutical firm, will present at both events, with webcasts available for playback.

feed.title: Darling Ingredients' Q4 Earnings and Sales Surpass Estimates
feed.summary: Darling Ingredients (DAR) reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding Zacks Consensus Estimates for both earnings and sales. The company achieved quarterly earnings of 64 cents per share and net sales of $1.71 billion, driven by robust performance in its Feed and Food segments and significant margin expansion. While the Feed segment expects a modest dip in Q1 2026 due to fat prices, the Fuel segment anticipates stable activity, and the Food segment maintains a positive outlook for the year.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal expands Japan brokerage with ex-Barclays hires
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal has expanded its Japanese brokerage operations by hiring two senior bankers, Ryuta Higuchi and Makoto Ohkawara, from Barclays. This move aims to capitalize on the growing demand among Japanese investors for overseas securities. Higuchi will focus on sales of non-yen fixed income securities to institutional investors, while Ohkawara will establish a foreign exchange and derivatives distribution team in Japan.

feed.title: Lovesac Company Launch Hotline to Help End “(SIT)UATIONSHIP”
feed.summary: The Lovesac Company (Nasdaq: LOVE) and "Summer House" star Amanda Batula have launched a new campaign called "[SIT]UATIONSHIP" to encourage people to upgrade from "settling" couches to durable Lovesac furniture. As part of this campaign, they are offering a hotline for individuals to share their couch "situationship" stories, with a chance to win a new Lovesac couch. This initiative, inspired by dating culture terminology, aims to highlight the longevity and quality of Lovesac products.

feed.title: Bill allowing Uber Technologies, Inc. (UBER) and Lyft in Israel receives committee approval
feed.summary: A bill that would permit ride-sharing companies Uber Technologies, Inc. (UBER) and Lyft to operate legally in Israel has been approved by a governmental committee. This development suggests a significant step towards introducing these services to the Israeli market.

feed.title: Goldman’s Top Lawyer Departs Amid Revelations About Her Ties to Epstein
feed.summary: Kathryn Ruemmler, Goldman Sachs's top lawyer, has resigned following the release of emails by the Justice Department detailing her extensive relationship with Jeffrey Epstein. Despite previous claims of a strictly professional connection, the communications revealed a personal friendship, including gift exchanges and advice on media scrutiny. David M. Solomon, Goldman's CEO, accepted her resignation, with Ruemmler stating her decision was to prioritize Goldman Sachs's interests.
